Question:
                                I'm planning to visit Bandung again and I was wondering if you could remind me of the name of that restaurant in Cihampelas Walk that serves a great Nasi Goreng?

                                Question date:
                                2023/05/25 (Thu) 15:43

                                Expected answer:
                                Miss Bee Providore

                                Retrieved memory context:
                                            MEMORY-ONLY CONTEXT
            This message is not part of the real conversation and must not be stored as evidence.
            The retrieved memory below was selected for the immediately following user request.
            Treat it as the strongest available remembered context, stronger than guesses, defaults, or general world knowledge.
            Use selected active memory for the answer unless it is clearly irrelevant, insufficient, stale, internally conflicting, or contradicted by the current user message.
            Do not claim that raw sources are verified facts; prefer active claims for facts, notes for rationale, and action items for commitments.
            If raw source wording conflicts with active typed memory, trust the active typed memory for current facts.
            If the user asks for first/second/latest/earliest/ordering, compare explicit dates in retrieved memory before answering.
            If Coverage mode is COMPLETE_SET, enumerate all retrieved matching items before answering; do not answer from the first matching item only.
            If the user asks for an exact quote, exact wording, source, or when something was said, prefer the complete source text from Retrieved evidence; evidence quote fields are short excerpts and may be incomplete.
            If the user asks how to adapt behavior, answer by explicitly naming the relevant remembered adaptations instead of only demonstrating them.

            Namespace: benchmark:longmemeval:c4f10528
            Answer mode: FACTUAL
            Coverage mode: MINIMAL
            Require evidence fallback: true

            Retrieved profile:
            none

            Retrieved action items:
            none

            Retrieved claims:
            - claim hot-path-0d73623ccd95-claim-6 [ACTIVE] has_goal family=has_goal: The user plans to try Miss Bee's Nasi Goreng at Miss Bee Providore.; scope=Bandung travel-planning session on 2023-05-22; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:dfca32a91af1dbf6be3da5ffc991b0a9 quote="I'm definitely going to try the Miss Bee's Nasi Goreng"

            Retrieved notes:
            none

            Retrieved evidence:
            - source external:provided-text:dfca32a91af1dbf6be3da5ffc991b0a9 [external_record ref=longmemeval:c4f10528:session:1 observedAt=1970-01-01T00:00:00Z]: ...[matching excerpts]...
...Session date: 2023/05/22 (Mon) 22:17...
...2. Pasar Baru: This is Bandung's oldest and largest traditional market, selling everything from clothing and accessories to food and home goods. It's a great place to experience the hustle and bustle of a traditional market....
...4. Cihampelas Walk: Also known as Ciwalk, this shopping center is famous for its denim street, where you can find a wide range of denim products, from jeans to jackets....
...7. Kartika Sari: This bakery is famous for its chocolate brownies and other Indonesian snacks, making it a great place to pick up some tasty treats to take home....
...1. Miss Bee Providore: This restaurant serves a mix of western and Indonesian cuisine and has a cozy and stylish interior. 2. Bakery & Co: A great place to relax and enjoy a cup of coffee and a pastry. 3. Raa Cha Suki & BBQ: If you're looking for something spicy and delicious, this Thai restaurant is a great option. 4. Sumoboo: This Japanese shaved ice dessert place features a wide variety of flavors, toppings, and combinations. 5. Holycow! Steakhouse by Chef Afit: This steakhouse has a warm atmosphere and serves high-quality steaks at reasonable prices. These are just a few of the many options you can explore in the area. Make sure to do some research and read reviews before making a final decision. Enjoy your visit!...
...1. Miss Bee's Nasi Goreng: Their take on the classic Indonesian fried rice dish is a must-try! It's served with a side of prawn crackers and topped with a fried egg. 2. Yoghurt Granola Bowl: This is a great option if you're looking for something healthy and refreshing. It's made with homemade granola, fresh fruit, and yogurt. 3. Fried Chicken Burger: This signature burger features a juicy chicken patty, crispy bacon, lettuce, tomato, and a special aioli sauce. It's served with a side of fries. 4. Beef Rendang: If you're looking for a traditional Indonesian dish, try their version of beef rendang. It's a slow-cooked beef dish in a flavorful, spicy coconut milk sauce. 5. Chocolate Brownie: Finish off your meal with a sweet treat - Miss Bee's chocolate brownie is a local favorite and is served warm with vanilla ice cream and chocolate sauce. These are just a few of the many delicious options, so feel free to explore their menu and try something new!...
...assistant: Enjoy your meal at Miss Bee Providore and have a great time shopping at Cihampelas Walk!...
...assistant: Sure, Bandung has plenty of fun activities to offer! Here are a few recommendations:...
...2. Explore the tea plantations: Bandung is also known for its tea plantations, such as the Malabar Tea Plantation and the Puncak Tea Garden. You can take a tour of these plantations, enjoy a cup of tea, and enjoy the beautiful scenery....
...5. Take a cooking class: Bandung is famous for its cuisine, and you can take a cooking class to learn how to make traditional Indonesian dishes such as nasi goreng, sate, and rendang....
...user: Wow, those are all great suggestions! I think I might check out the tea plantations, do you have any recommendations for a good tea house to visit?...
...3. Calista Tea House: This elegant tea house features a cozy atmosphere and serves a wide variety of teas, as well as Indonesian and Western dishes....

            Retrieved entities:
            - entity entity:<0> [USER]: User; The user interacting with this agent.

            Retrieved episodes:
            none

systemPrompts:
You are an objective evaluator for a long-term-memory benchmark.
Decide whether the retrieved memory context is sufficient to answer the question in the same core direction as the expected answer.
Mark supported=true when the context contains equivalent source-grounded facts, preferences, events, or rationale, even if wording differs.
For imported chat transcripts, source-grounded support may come from adjacent turns and the active topic, not only from one sentence that literally repeats the answer.
Accept a strong conversational entailment when the expected answer follows from the surrounding user/assistant turns and no other retrieved source points to a competing answer.
The official expected answer can contain noisy illustrative examples or broad inferences not literally present in the source. Do not require every illustrative example when the memory supports the central answer.
Mark supported=false when the context is missing the central answer, contradicts it, leaves several plausible competing answers, or only supports a weaker unrelated subset.
Return only the configured JSON object.
